channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Philips Hue’s rumored TV camera would be a huge shift for the smart lighting giant — but rival brands Govee and Nanoleaf have been doing it for years
item.description: Philips Hue could launch a new camera gadget for TV backlight syncing at IFA 2026.

item.title: Le prix de ce laptop gamer Lenovo 165 Hz avec RTX 5070 et 32 Go de RAM s’allège de 210 € en cette fin de soldes
item.description: Les soldes d'été touchent à leur fin. Mais il est encore possible de faire de très bonnes affaires : par exemple, le Lenovo Legion 5 15IRX10, un PC portable gaming avec une RTX 5070, 32 Go de RAM et un écran rafraîchi à 165 Hz, est proposé à 1 319,99 euros au lieu de 1 529,99 euros par Cdiscount.

item.title: Garmin présente le Cirqa, un bracelet connecté sans écran pour concurrencer Whoop
item.description: Garmin s'attaque à Whoop avec le Cirqa, son premier bracelet connecté sans écran et sans abonnement.

item.title: Merci l’IA : Linux a corrigé plus de 400 failles de sécurité en 24 heures !
item.description: En 24 heures, Linux a corrigé plus de 400 failles de sécurité dans son noyau. Ce record est largement dû à l'intelligence artificielle, désormais massivement adoptée par les chercheurs en sécurité.

item.title: A new Google Home Display is reportedly on the way — but what our smart homes actually need in 2026 is a proper Pixel Tablet successor
item.description: A new Home Display sounds intriguing — but I’ll be disappointed if Google gives us another stationary screen instead of a movable AI hub.

item.title: Starlink Mini 2 may come with a major speed downgrade, according to a new leak —and that’s bad news for some users
item.description: The Starlink Mini 2 could have a built-in battery but lower internet speeds, a new leak claims.

item.title: Top AI coding agents can be easy victims to sandbox escapes, showing they aren't as secure as they claim to be
item.description: What if a host component outside the sandbox reads AI coding agents' output? And what if that output is manipulated?

item.title: Pourquoi votre écran LG installe des pubs McAfee sur votre PC (et comment l’éviter)
item.description: Brancher un écran LG sur un PC Windows peut suffire à y installer une application qui pousse des pubs pour l’antivirus McAfee. Sans prévenir, sans rien demander.

item.title: America needs to stop getting shocked by Chinese AI
item.description: Last week, two Chinese AI companies unveiled models they say can credibly compete with the best systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. The response was swift and predictable. Markets wobbled, commentators declared Silicon Valley shooketh, and policymakers reached for the familiar language of arms races and wake-up calls. In one headline, The Associated Press said a […]...

item.title: Comment Waze vous aide à trouver le carburant le moins cher sur votre itinéraire ?
item.description: Waze propose une fonctionnalité pratique, permettant de connaitre le prix du carburant sur votre trajet. Découvrez comment ça marche.

item.title: The Best Smart Home Accessories to Boost Your Curb Appeal (2026)
item.description: These locks, lights, and other smart home upgrades let you add automation without messing up your home’s vibe.

item.title: Abdul El-Sayed Is an Epidemiologist Running for Senate. His State Is a Public Health Disaster
item.description: Michigan has been at the epicenter of the wildfire smoke and explosive diarrhea outbreaks. The progressive Democrat talks to WIRED about how he would tackle the forces behind them if he’s elected.

item.title: How to watch World Matchplay Darts 2026: Free Streams & Schedule
item.description: Here's how to watch World Matchplay Darts 2026 live streams online from anywhere in the world, as Luke Littler defends his title at Blackpool's Winter Gardens.

item.title: AI in orbit: The next evolution of compute infrastructure
item.description: Satellites used to send you everything. Now they just send you what matters.

item.title: Sony files another lawsuit against AI music generator Udio
item.description: Sony, the only major music label that has yet to sign a deal with Udio, has sued the AI music generator again.

item.title: Amazon baisse déjà le prix de la toute nouvelle montre connectée de Xiaomi, la Redmi Watch 6
item.description: La Xiaomi Redmi Watch 6 est la dernière montre connectée de la marque qui mise sur un écran Amoled lumineux, une bonne autonomie et un GPS pour suivre vos activités. La voilà déjà en promotion à 90,99 euros au lieu de 99,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: 'A clever concept, and for those with a video or photo editing workflow, it's genuinely useful': The TobenONE 11-in-1 USB-C Docking Station is 36% off — now just $82.79
item.description: The TobenONE 11-in-1 USB-C docking station with dual 4K support and programmable controls is now 36% off at Amazon.

item.title: What the 2026 World Cup is revealing about the future of product identification
item.description: The 2026 World Cup is the most compressed supply chain stress test in history.

item.title: Soldes d’été : c’est le tout dernier jour pour s’offrir une tablette ou une liseuse à prix cassé
item.description: C’est aujourd’hui le tout dernier jour des soldes d’été : l’ultime occasion de craquer pour une tablette tactile à prix cassé. Que vous soyez adepte de l'écosystème Apple avec les iPad, ou plutôt team Android chez Samsung, Xiaomi ou Honor. Voici la sélection des meilleures offres à saisir avant minuit.

item.title: Samsung dévoile un écran OLED avec une luminosité record: une nouvelle référence pour les PC portables ?
item.description: Samsung a présenté un écran OLED certifié DisplayHDR True Black 1400, capable d'atteindre 1 400 nits de luminosité. Le Lenovo Yoga Pro 9i de 11e génération est le premier ordinateur portable à intégrer cet écran.

item.title: Fin d’OxygenOS : voici les appareils OnePlus qui auront droit à ColorOS 17
item.description: OnePlus enterre OxygenOS. À partir d'Android 17, ses smartphones basculeront sur ColorOS, la surcouche d'Oppo. On fait le tri entre les modèles servis et les oubliés.

item.title: ‘It’s a Modern-Day Draft’: Why Stanford Students Walked Out on Sundar Pichai’s Commencement Speech
item.description: Last month, more than a hundred Stanford students left their own graduation to protest Google’s military contracts and deals with ICE. Two organizers, Amanda Campos and Eva Jones, tell us why.

item.title: Score a Minisforum Ryzen 5 or Ryzen 7 mini PC from $600 in Best Buy's big sale
item.description: Minisforum UM760 Slim and Minisforum UM870 Slim both get a price cut in the Black Friday in July sale — choose between Ryzen 5 and Ryzen 7.

item.title: Agentic AI in the enterprise: Why architecture matters more than marketing claims
item.description: Most "AI-powered" marketing tools are just rule engines in disguise. Here's how to tell the difference.

item.title: Over half of all new music on streaming sites is now AI-generated, and the number is growing rapidly — but one platform is bringing the hammer down hard
item.description: Deezer has announced that half of all new music uploaded to its site is AI slop, alongside new rule changes on how it's dealing with it

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for July 21, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1858 on July 21 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for July 21, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for July 21, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: Lego is giving away free sports car models this month — how to get yours
item.description: Lego Insiders can join a free adults-only sports car build event this July and take home their creation. Here’s all the details.

item.title: Avant les dinosaures, un événement cosmique oublié a frappé la Terre : les scientifiques découvrent ce qui s’est passé
item.description: La mécanique céleste permet de calculer, jusqu'à un certain point, le futur du Système solaire à partir de son état présent, mais elle peut aussi de cette façon calculer son état passé. Une équipe de chercheurs vient de déduire l'occurrence d'un événement cataclysmique, dont nous ne possédions...

item.title: UK AI data centers could be given water priority during heatwaves and hosepipe bans — trade body warns that usage hasn’t been factored into AI growth zone projections
item.description: The trade body representing UK water companies says that the UK government hasn't properly estimated projections for AI water usage.

item.title: Avant que son prix n’augmente, la Nintendo Switch 2 s’offre une remise de 70 € sur Amazon
item.description: La Nintendo Switch 2, console hybride de Nintendo lancée en juin 2025, est disponible à 399,99 euros au lieu de 469 euros sur Amazon grâce à un coupon. Une aubaine à saisir avant la hausse de prix officielle prévue au 1er septembre prochain.

item.title: Volkswagen avait promis un ID. Cross abordable. Il est pour le moment hors de prix
item.description: Volkswagen ouvre le carnet de commandes de l’ID. Cross avec les premiers tarifs. Attendu bon marché, le petit SUV électrique est pour l’instant hors de prix. Aurions-nous été floués par la marque allemande ?

item.title: Who’s afraid of the big, bad GPU?
item.description: How does AI make you feel? Are you excited to “vibe-code” your smart home? Or anxious about all the added pollution and billions of gallons of water used by data centers? Dig a little deeper and you’ll start to question the actual value of the GPUs that underpin all the leaps and promises of generative […]

item.title: Stop Saying Kids Can’t Read
item.description: Everyone is talking about the reading crisis. But inside the “Mississippi Miracle,” it’s all about comprehension.

item.title: A Device Hidden in Cars Across the US Leaves Them Vulnerable to Hacking and Paralysis. Patch It Now
item.description: Dealerships installed alarms in millions of vehicles—and left them in even if the buyer didn’t want them. Now researchers warn they can be hacked to unlock, track, and disable cars.

item.title: Gritt exits stealth with $34 million for robots to build solar plants—then, everything else
item.description: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plan to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.

item.title: The coming burnout from managing AI agents
item.description: And how to avoid it in your organization. Technology leaders are very comfortable talking about productivity. We can discuss automation rates, developer velocity, cost curves, and defect rates with great confidence.

item.title: Want to live forever? There’s a house for that
item.description: Over-optimization is coming to your home—if you can afford it. Kas Bordier sells her clients a vision of longer, healthier, and constantly measured lives—one that’s perfectly attuned to today’s optimized pursuit of health.

item.title: Trump’s proposed ban on Kimi and other Chinese AI models could strengthen Beijing’s hand
item.description: The U.S. risks alienating countries that are uneasy about relying on products controlled by a small number of American AI companies. The Trump administration has had plenty of targets in its sights in recent months. The newest are China’s cutting-edge AI models.

item.title: Hollywood wants the internet’s next horror hit
item.description: The Mandela Catalogue and Siren Head are becoming movies as studios race to find the next internet-born horror hit.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked
item.description: All TechRadar articles about Samsung Galaxy Unpacked

item.title: How to watch The Hundred 2026: Free Streams & TV Channels
item.description: All the ways to watch The Hundred 2026 live streams online from anywhere, with the sixth edition of the tournament introducing a host of changes.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection Series 2 is on sale at Amazon — save close to $10
item.description: Save 15% on the Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection Series 2 at Amazon, now down to $50.87.

item.title: Kimmel guest host Colman Domingo reacts to Trump getting booed at World Cup
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel's latest guest host Colman Domingo reacted to Donald Trump getting booed at the World Cup final.

item.title: Regularly over $1,500, the Roborock Saros 10R robot vacuum and mop is $700 off right now at Amazon
item.description: As of July 21, the Roborock Saros 10R robot vacuum and mop is discounted to $899.99 at Amazon. That's 44% off its full price of $1,599.99.

item.title: Lenovo’s new Yoga might be the thinnest laptop I’ve ever tested — but there’s one spec that impressed me even more
item.description: The Yoga Slim 7x Gen 11 certainly impresses with its thin form — but is its performance equally as stunning?
